paragraphs: I am an Associate Professor of Information Systems at Korea University Business School. My research focuses on Artificial Intelligence, IT and Societal Outcomes, and Business Analytics, investigating how AI applications and digital technologies impact local economies, consumer behaviors, and business ecosystems.

Prior to joining Korea University in 2020, I served as a faculty member at Sungkyunkwan University (2017–2020) and Nanyang Technological University in Singapore (2015–2017). I received my Ph.D. in Information Systems from Arizona State University in 2015.

My work has been published in leading journals including MIS Quarterly, Information Systems Research, Journal of the Association for Information Systems, Journal of Management Information Systems, and Expert Systems with Applications. I also serve as a Director Board member at the KU ESG Research Institution and have consulted for companies including NAVER, Kakao Mobility, LG Electronics, Samsung Electronics, NAVER WebToon, Hospitals, Banks, Law Firms, Concsulting Frims and Goverment Agencies.

honors: Research Excellence Grant, Korea University Business School (2024, 2025)
Best Paper Awards at ICIS, AMCIS, KrAIS, KMIS, and other conferences (multiple years)
service: Director Board, KU ESG Research Institution (2023–Present)
Conference Program Committee: ICIS, CIST, WITS, WISE, ICEC, KrAIS, KMIS
Journal Referee: MISQ, ISR, Management Science, JMIS, DSS, and others
consulting: NAVER Corporation — Financial Aids & SMEs, AI-powered Recommendations, Market Diversity (2018–Present)
LG CNS — Generative AI & LLM for Continuous Monitoring, ML-Based Causal Inferences (2024–Present)
Kakao Mobility — Valuation of Taxi Transportation Data (2023–Present)
NAVER Webtoon — AI-powered Piracy Detection & Content Curation (2023–Present)
Korea Standards Association — Digital Consumer Experience Index (DCXI) (2022–Present)
Samsung Electronics — Data Analytics & New Product Development (2018–2020)

research.title: Artificial Intelligence (AI)
research.description: Impact of AI applications on local economies, AI-based recommendations on consumer behaviors, role of generative AI in business, and AI ethics.

research.title: IT and Societal Outcomes
research.description: Impact of digital technologies on local economies, digital piracy, digital divide, data privacy regulations (GDPR), and network neutrality.

research.title: Business Analytics
research.description: Big data analytics on mobile platforms, digital innovation, sharing economy, and data-driven business strategies.

teaching.title: Business Analytics
teaching.description: Introduction to data analytics methods, tools, and applications for solving real-world business problems.

teaching.title: AI for Business
teaching.description: Foundations of artificial intelligence and its practical applications in business strategy, operations, and decision-making.

teaching.title: Management Information Systems
teaching.description: Fundamentals of information systems and their strategic role in modern business organizations.

teaching.title: AI for Business
teaching.description: Advanced AI methodologies including deep learning, NLP, and generative AI applied to business research and practice.

teaching.title: Data Analytics for Business
teaching.description: Advanced topics in machine learning, statistical modeling, and data-driven decision-making for business applications.

teaching.title: IS Research Seminar
teaching.description: Research methodologies, current topics, and emerging trends in information systems research.

news.title: Paper Published in MIS Quarterly
news.content: "Consumer Evaluation of Digital Product Innovations" accepted at MIS Quarterly, a premier IS journal.

news.title: Paper Published in Information Systems Research
news.content: "Impact of the General Data Protection Regulation on the Global Mobile App Market" published in ISR, 36(2).

news.title: DCXI (Digital Customer Experience Index) Development
news.content: Co-developed the DCXI model with the Korean Standards Association (KSA) and Korea University CDTB, evaluating digital customer experience across industries.

news.title: [Op-Ed] Platform Regulation Overlooking Small Businesses
news.content: Published an opinion piece on the Fair Trade Commission's Platform Competition Promotion Act, arguing it could create reverse discrimination against domestic platforms and accelerate threats from foreign e-commerce to local small businesses.

news.title: [Media] Naver Webtoon's 'Toon Raider' Anti-Piracy Research
news.content: Presented research at the Korean Media Management Association showing Naver Webtoon's AI-based 'Toon Raider' delays illegal distribution by approximately 25 days.

news.title: [Interview] AI Regulation & Corporate Ethics
news.content: Interviewed by the Anti-Corruption & Civil Rights Commission (ACRC) on AI regulation trends, corporate compliance, fairness, transparency, and data privacy.
